reviewsSummary.note: No new fix features completed since round 3. All 5 fix features remain pending with no worker sessions. Prior round 3 blocking issues persist unchanged. No new reviews spawned.

blockingIssues.description: Directory-scoped REVIEW.md is still collapsed into one run-wide TrustedRules.ReviewMarkdown winner rather than applying the nearest directory review per changed file/path. Fix feature remains pending (no worker session).

.gitlab/ai-review.yaml loader still suppresses unknown-field and validation warnings because parser warnings are dropped and unknown keys are silently accepted. Fix feature remains pending (no worker session).

/ai-review rerun and /ai-review focus generate idempotency keys with time.Now().UnixNano(), so command retries/replays can create duplicate runs instead of at-most-once command effects keyed to the note delivery. Fix feature remains pending (no worker session).

Note hook persistence and command execution are not atomic; if command execution fails after the hook event insert, a retried delivery is deduplicated and the command side effect is permanently lost. Fix feature remains pending (no worker session).

Degradation path never persists the skipped-file/reason summary on the writer-visible run field, so degraded runs fall back to a generic summary instead of the required explicit partial-coverage note (VAL-BETA-018). Fix feature remains pending (no worker session).
VAL-PERF-001 benchmark corpus, runnable harness, and checked-in runtime evidence are still missing from the repository. Fix feature remains pending (no worker session).

Runtime provider construction in cmd/worker/main.go is still hard-coded to default/secondary route names and never consumes effective project/group ProviderRoute policy end-to-end. Fix feature remains pending (no worker session).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that fix features created by scrutiny must be scheduled and completed by implementation workers before the next scrutiny re-run. The current round 4 was triggered with all 5 fix features still pending, producing no new review material.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 4 scrutiny found all 5 fix features (beta-repo-config-layer-correctness-fix, beta-command-webhooks-idempotency-atomicity-fix, beta-degradation-summary-persistence-fix, beta-large-mr-benchmark-evidence, beta-provider-route-runtime-wiring-fix) still in pending status with null completedWorkerSessionId.
